titleStmt.title: SII 42.30: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 30. (A.R. No. B. 37 of 1953-54.) Cheñchu-Eṟṟaguḍi, Dhone Taluk, Kurnool District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab in the compound of the Rāmaliṅgēśvara temple.
The record is dated Śaka 1489, Prabhava, Jyēshṭha, śu. 11, Sunday corresponding to 1567 A.D., May 18.

Records the gift of a plot of land for the Pañchāmṛita and Pulukāpu services to god Rāmēśvara of Yeṟaguḍi by Mahānāyakāchārya Mali-nāyiniṅgāru of Kambhālapāḍu for the merit of his father Chavuḍi-nēni. The plot of land appears to have been given to the donor as a gift by the villagers of Gummakoṇḍa and Teḷikimaṇḍavāḍa in appreciation of the settlement of a dispute between the two by Mali-nāyuḍu. Reference is also made to one Veligōṭi Tim[m*]aya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Figures of Sun, linga and moon.

svasti śrī jayādbhu(bhyu)daya śālivāhana śata(ka)
varuṣaṁbulu 1489 Agunēṭi prabhava saṁva
cha(tsa)ra jē(jyē)ṣṭha śudha(ddha) 11 Ādivārānanu śrīman ma
hānāyakācāryulayina kaṁbhālapāṭi
ma li(lli)nāyinigāru yarraguḍi rāmēśvaruni
ki sama¨rpiṁcina śā(sē)vakramameṭlannanu gumma
koṁḍa teḷiki maṁḍavāḍa yī reṁḍu vū(Ū)ḷlavāru po
lamēra tīrakamuḍipaḍi Anaka kālaṁ tiraka dha
nimityaṁ Āra(reṁ)ḍūḷlavāru māku yici
nāru Ā polaṁ kha 1 nu mā taṁḍri cavuḍi nēniki
puṇyaṁgānu paṁcāmṛta pulikāpu śā(sē)vaku sama¨rpiṁ
ci ṁ gummakoṁḍa reḍḍi karaṇālu māku
tathātithi [Ārādhanalaku] mātaṁḍri
chavuḍi nāyiniki puṇyaṁgānu sama¨rpistimi yī
dha¨rmāniki ya(E)varu vakramayinānu tama tallidaṁ
ḍrādulanu vāraṇāsilō vadhiyiṁcina vāru .
nēṭi veligōṭi timaya modalayina pra lu mā
ṁku yiccina polaṁ kha . mātaṁḍri cavuḍi nā
yaniki Ī puṇyaṁgānu naṁdādīpānaku sama¨rpistimi
Digital edition of SII 42.30 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
